spec_match.rationale: Walks the four-message protocol (dictionary fetch, Use-As-Dictionary, Available-Dictionary follow-up, dcb response) with correct header names.

interactive.rationale: Stepper buttons advance the ladder diagram with per-step commentary.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page delivers exactly what the blurb promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path only. No path for cache miss, no path for sha256 mismatch.

openQuestions.title: Add a 5th step for cache miss / mismatch
openQuestions.detail: Show fallback to plain brotli when Available-Dictionary is missing or sha256 doesn't match.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 1 follow-up question(s) remain.
